title: josefclient
description:
Josef client - A modding test project

This is a client side only mod to display you some infos about your client. This includes FPS, CPS, coordinates and much more :)
body:
This is Josef Client. 

A fabric mod to display some infos about your world. This is a small side project to learn the fabric api and improve our coding skills.

Currently, the mod does the following:
- Displays coordinates
- Displays FPS
- Displays CPS
- Displays Info about item durability
- Open a mod menu with F6 (to toggle all those overlays such as FPS etc.)

You can use this in your custom modpack or use our own Client launcher that will come soon!
